"[5] ^SIGALERT UPDATE IN BALDWIN PARK: EB I-10, AT I-605. THE HOV LANE IS NOW OPEN. THE #1 THROUGH #4 LANES ARE BLOCKED. THE TRANSITION ROAD FROM NB I-605, TO EB I-10 WILL REMAIN CLOSED. CLOSURE WILL REMAIN IN EFFECT FOR APPROXIMATELY ONE HOUR DUE TO A TRAFFIC COLLISION. REF LOG: 0135"
